name: 化学防害上尉| 法国宪兵特勤队
nameZh: 化学防害上尉| 法国宪兵特勤队
descriptionEn: As leader for Chemical and BioHazard combat operations in populated areas, the Gendarmerie Chem-Haz Capitaine plays a crucial role within the organization. Celebrated for orchestrating the successful rescue of an entire domestic airport's civilian occupancy in the infamous sarin gas attack of 1997, the Chem-Haz Capitaine is the epitome of preparedness and composure. Don't forget to breathe.
descriptionZh: 法国宪兵特勤队化学防害上尉，是组织中的领导人物，负责领导和指挥特勤队在人口密集区打击化学和生物危害袭击。最著名的一次行动是在1997年发生的臭名昭著的沙林毒气袭击中成功营救和保护了一整个国内机场的平民。自此，上尉便成为了沉着冷静的代名词。 冷静，去感受呼吸。
